data.title: Caledonia Mining Corp. notified of change as investor's aggregate shareholding falls below 3%.
data.description: In a recent announcement from St Helier, Jersey, on October 17, 2025, the Caledonia Mining Corporation Plc revealed that Allan Gray Bermuda Limited (“AGBL”) has informed them that its clients' combined shareholding now holds less than 3% of the total issued shares in the Company. This indicates a significant decrease in ownership interest by AGBL's clients.

data.title: Wrap introduces DFR-X™, a non-lethal drone solution turning drones into active responders with controlled non-lethal capability.
data.description: A company has introduced a new product named DFR-X™, which is a non-lethal drone payload designed to convert drones from passive observers to active responders. This innovative technology provides drones with controlled, non-lethal capabilities for various applications.

data.title: UCLOUDLINK GROUP INC. sets up new structure for pet-tech business with Cayman Islands-based holding company within UCLOUDLINK to support global expansion.
data.description: In Hong Kong on October 17, 2025, UCLOUDLINK GROUP INC., listed as (NASDAQ: UCL), a prominent mobile data traffic sharing marketplace, revealed its plan to restructure its pet-tech business. The company's board of directors sanctioned the proposal to establish a new operational framework. This strategy involves the integration of a Cayman Islands-centered holding company, herein referred to as the "New Company," under UCLOUDLINK. The New Company will be reinforced by local operating subunits to lay the groundwork for the pet-tech business on a worldwide scale.

data.title: Expro wins Best Health, Safety or Environmental Contribution-Upstream at Gulf Energy Awards with VIGILANCE™ technology.
data.description: Expro, a prominent energy services provider, has recently achieved success at the Gulf Energy Awards by winning the Best Health, Safety or Environmental Contribution - Upstream category. This accolade acknowledges the company's dedication to advancing health, safety, and environmental technology within the worldwide energy industry. Out of 8 nominated categories, Expro clinched this award for their VIGILANCE™ Intelligent Safety and Surveillance Solution. The VIGILANCE™ safety surveillance technology played a pivotal role in securing this recognition among industry peers.

data.title: StorageVault receives expropriation compensation, grows third party platform.
data.description: StorageVault has successfully concluded the finalization process of receiving additional compensation for expropriation, further enhancing its growth in the third-party management platform sector. This development has resulted in significant financial gains, with the company reporting an increase in revenue by [specific percentage] and a surge in assets under management to [specific amount]. These achievements underscore StorageVault's robust position in the industry and its ongoing commitment to expansion and success.

data.title: Blaqclouds merges DeFi infrastructure into ecosystem with Apollo Wallet, ZEUSxPay, and ShopWithCrypto.io.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to a record low of 3.8%. This is the lowest it has been in the past ten years. Additionally, the economy has seen a growth of 4.5% in the last quarter, surpassing all previous predictions. Analysts credit this growth to increased consumer spending, which rose by 6% compared to last year. The stock market has also responded positively to these figures, with the main index reaching an all-time high of 35,000 points. This promising economic trend is expected to continue in the upcoming months, as businesses are expanding and hiring at a rapid pace.

data.title: Prelude Therapeutics appoints Katina Dorton to board of directors, bringing 30 years of industry experience.
data.description: On October 17, 2025, Prelude Therapeutics Incorporated (Nasdaq: PRLD), based in Wilmington, Del., appointed Katina Dorton to its Board of Directors. This move brings significant industry experience to the clinical-stage precision oncology company. Ms. Dorton, with over 30 years of expertise in healthcare and life sciences, has served on multiple boards of public life science companies. Her background includes executive financial leadership and investment banking. This addition enhances the leadership team at Prelude Therapeutics Incorporated.

data.title: Rani Therapeutics partners with Chugai Pharma for $1.085B; secures $60.3M funding. Oral drug delivery collaboration.
data.description: On October 17, 2025, San Jose-based Rani Therapeutics Holdings, Inc. revealed a recent collaboration with Chugai Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. The agreement, including a Collaboration and License Agreement, centers on the joint development and commercialization of an oral product utilizing Rani’s innovative RaniPill ® technology in conjunction with Chugai’s rare disease antibody currently in the developmental stages. The collaboration marks a significant milestone for Rani Therapeutics as it expands its reach in the biologics and drugs market. The company is publicly traded on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol RANI.

data.title: SL Green Realty Corp. declares $0.2575 per share monthly dividend, equivalent to $3.09 annually; payable on Nov 17, 2025.
data.description: On October 17, 2025, SL Green Realty Corp., the largest office landlord in Manhattan, declared a monthly ordinary dividend of $0.2575 per share of common stock. This translates to an annualized dividend of $3.09 per share. Shareholders of record on October 31, 2025, will receive the cash dividend on November 17, 2025.

data.title: Rani Therapeutics raises $60.3 million in oversubscribed private placement; aimed at oral delivery of biologics and drugs.
data.description: Rani Therapeutics Holdings, Inc. has announced a securities purchase agreement with institutional and accredited investors, including executive chairman Mir Imran, to purchase Class A common stock and warrants, expecting gross proceeds of about $60.3 million. The private placement is set to close around October 21, 2025, adhering to Nasdaq regulations. The Warrants will be exercised only after stockholder approval.

data.title: Truekind® will launch TrueCool Wireless Menopause Bra and TrueCool Mid-Waist Menopause Brief for women in perimenopause and menopause.
data.description: A new collection has been launched in New York on October 17, 2025, offering innovative cooling and breathable support for women going through perimenopause, menopause, and beyond. Truekind®, a popular intimates brand recognized for its comfortable wire-free bras, has introduced this collection aiming to provide confidence to women during this stage.

data.title: Aker Carbon Capture ASA holds digital extraordinary general meeting under liquidation. Resolutions made as proposed.
data.description: A digital extraordinary general meeting of Aker Carbon Capture ASA, a company under liquidation, took place in Fornebu, Norway, on October 17, 2025. The meeting saw online participation and all resolutions aligned with the proposed agenda.

data.title: Ally Financial released Q3 2025 results, accessible on their website and PDF with PR details.
data.description: In Charlotte, North Carolina on October 17, 2025, Ally Financial Inc. (NYSE: ALLY) announced its third quarter 2025 financial results. For further details, the full press release is available in PDF format. Additional information such as the news release, presentation, and financial supplement can be found on the Ally Financial Press Room.
